title: Assignment 1
text:
(a)
In the video called “Veri Bilimi ve Endüstri Mühendisliği Üzerine Sohbetler - Baykal Hafızoğlu & Erdi Daşdemir”, Baykal Hafızoğlu talks about the operational challenges and critical success factors for data analytics and operations research projects. Hafızoğlu talks about data analytics in four different frameworks: descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive analytics. Hafızoğlu stresses that “Every project starts with a clear and quantifiable problem definition.” Some key points from this video include: “The actual model creation, optimization piece of a project is only 1%, while the remaining 99% is actually ‘dirty work’, so that the model actually reaches the user.” Hafızoğlu says that “A model can be mathematically optimal but still be considered a failure if it does not deploy or if it does deploy but lacks explainability such that, we can’t actually show cause and effect.”
Open Ended Question: Why is defining a “quantifiable KPI” is essential before starting any analytics project, and how does this impact the communication with non-technical stakeholders?
Answer:
Defining a quantifiable KPI is essential because it translates complex business problems into a common, objective language. Stakeholders often provide overwhelming, unstructured information, and without a specific metric, it is difficult to align on goals. Establishing a measurable KPI allows both technical teams and stakeholders to agree on a specific target, making success criteria clear and measurable.
Multiple Choice Question: When categorizing analytics into four frameworks, which method is described as being analogous to a doctor writing a prescription for a patient, as it suggests specific actions to be taken to solve a problem?

Descriptive Analytics
Diagnostic Analytics
Predictive Analytics
Prescriptive Analytics

Answer: D) Prescriptive Analytics
Note: AI tools were used to create the questions. The prompt was: “Can you create one open ended and one multiple choice question with their answers according to the transcript that I will give you.”

title: Assignment 1

(b)

library(dslabs)
data("polls_us_election_2016")
my_first <- "Furkan"
my_birth_year <- 2004
k <- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %% 15 + 8
if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(polls_us_election_2016, k)
} else {
  tail(polls_us_election_2016, k)
}

copied_data <- polls_us_election_2016

for(i in 1:ncol(copied_data)) {
  if(class(copied_data[[i]]) == "numeric") {
    copied_data[[i]] <- ifelse(is.na(copied_data[[i]]), my_birth_year + k, copied_data[[i]])
  } else {
    copied_data[[i]] <- ifelse(is.na(copied_data[[i]]), paste0(my_first, k), copied_data[[i]])
  }
}

if (k %% 2 == 0) {

} else {
